facts.statement: The foundation model tracks the identity line more closely than the comparator models across confidence bins and has the lowest expected calibration error.
The high-confidence calibration conclusion is supported by non-trivial prediction mass across upper-confidence bins rather than a sparse extreme tail.

design_notes: Show the calibration reference line explicitly so overconfidence and underconfidence are visually grounded.
Pair calibration quality with support-by-bin so ECE is not interpreted without coverage context.
Keep model identity consistent across panels with direct labels and repeated styling, not color alone.
